intro: Real-life dating simulation game "Love Too Easily 2: Summer Pocha."
description:
[Story]

"That night… did we just clink our glasses?"

You were living the life of an ordinary delivery man, and one day you get scammed by your only friend and end up taking over a failing, debt-ridden Pocha.

Wait... but why are there so many pretty girls at this Pocha?!


[About]

A story shaped entirely by your choices, 'Love Too Easily 2: Summer Pocha' is an FMV simulation game where the story unfolds in a Pocha with five attractive girls.

Become the owner of a Pocha and win over the affection of the girls you like to find your true love!

Pick the right choices to raise affection levels, and show your feelings with thoughtful gifts!

[Characters]

Five girls, each with her own charm and personality!

Who will you choose?

●Adorable Pocha part-timer: Choi Sol (Lee Heeru)

Overflowing with cuteness—the bright and bubbly mascot of the Pocha!

“Good morning, boss!”

●Pocha regular/writer: Anna (Shin Jiwon/Johyun)

Professional and elegant… yet secretly a goofy heavy drinker!

“Can you be the main character of my story?”


●Heartwarming first love classmate: Sarang (Yang Seul)

A first love with its secret innocence..!
“How.. have you been? Finally, we meet again..”


●Famous streamer: Gain (Oh Yeonha)

Bright, bubbly, and impossible to ignore on camera!
“Then let’s drop the formalities—call me your girl, oppa~”


●Proud indie band singer: Nana (Eun Daha)

Cool, sharp, and fiercely independent—like a desert fox.
“What..? So?”
